title: A few whatif questions I have
display_title: A few whatif questions I have
wikitext:
[]: A few whatif questions I have             Quote Post by mastervampire » Mon Jun 28, 2010 7:30 pm 1. What if the FAR discovered what was going on with Earth? Two seeds on the one planet, Seele up to no good, making the Eva’s etc….. Would they take action? 2. What if Asuka realised (or was told) about how her mother’s soul was in Eva 2? She really seemed to take control of it in EoE once she realised and I wonder what it would have been like if this revelation happened earlier in the series. 3. What if humans eventually got to the point where they starting making space ships and started exploring the universe and came across Angel like planets? 4. What if when Shinji and Asuka kissed, Shinji surprised her and actually embraced her giving the best kiss she ever received?

[]: Re: A few whatif questions I have             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jun 28, 2010 7:44 pm mastervampire wrote: 1. What if the FAR discovered what was going on with Earth? Two seeds on the one planet, Seele up to no good, making the Eva’s etc….. Would they take action?

[]: Re: A few whatif questions I have             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jun 28, 2010 8:00 pm Ornette wrote: Sci-fi tropes would probably say that the FAR were long dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Mon Jun 28, 2010 8:04 pm 3. What if humans eventually got to the point where they starting making space ships and started exploring the universe and came across Angel like planets?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jun 28, 2010 8:12 pm 1. What if the FAR discovered what was going on with Earth? Two seeds on the one planet, Seele up to no good, making the Eva’s etc….. Would they take action?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Jun 28, 2010 11:15 pm Aura, I think we're supposed to be focusing on the "embrace" part. Which is an interesting question, since Asuka tells mindrape!Shinji "You won't even hold me." It's possible that in the grand scheme of things, nothing would be affected; that this isn't enough to rescuse her from loss of synch ratio followed by stupidity with Arael.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 1:47 am mastervampire wrote: 1. What if the FAR discovered what was going on with Earth? Two seeds on the one planet, Seele up to no good, making the Eva’s etc….. Would they take action?

[]: Re: A few whatif questions I have             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 29, 2010 1:51 am mastervampire wrote: What if ...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:00 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Yesterday I was reading Reichu's translation of Kaworu's ending in NGE2, and in that case another Seed of Life suggest him to start voyaging again but Kaworu misidentified it for a FAR while he was only more conscious of his FAR origins, so I don't know if this is what could have happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:14 am Reichu wrote: Where did you get the "misidentified" part from?

[]: A few whatif questions I have             Quote Post by mastervampire » Mon Jun 28, 2010 7:30 pm 1. What if the FAR discovered what was going on with Earth? Two seeds on the one planet, Seele up to no good, making the Eva’s etc….. Would they take action? 2. What if Asuka realised (or was told) about how her mother’s soul was in Eva 2? She really seemed to take control of it in EoE once she realised and I wonder what it would have been like if this revelation happened earlier in the series. 3. What if humans eventually got to the point where they starting making space ships and started exploring the universe and came across Angel like planets? 4. What if when Shinji and Asuka kissed, Shinji surprised her and actually embraced her giving the best kiss she ever received?
